description: Set item definitions — maps individual set pieces to their base items, fixed (blue) properties, and partial/full set (green) bonus properties.

index.description: Unique identifier for this set item entry, used as a key by other files. Not read by 1.13c engine

set.description: Parent set this item belongs to. Not read by 1.13c engine

item.description: Base item code referencing armor.txt, weapons.txt, or misc.txt code columns. Not read by 1.13c engine

*item.description: Comment column — human-readable base item name for reference only. Not read by 1.13c engine

rarity.description: Relative rarity weight for drop selection among set items of the same base type. Not read by 1.13c engine

lvl.description: Internal item level used for affix generation and TC qualification. Not read by 1.13c engine

lvl req.description: Minimum character level required to equip this set item. Not read by 1.13c engine

chrtransform.description: Color transform applied to the character model when item is equipped. Not read by 1.13c engine

invtransform.description: Color transform applied to the inventory graphic. Not read by 1.13c engine

invfile.description: Override inventory graphic DC6 filename (blank uses base item default). Not read by 1.13c engine

flippyfile.description: Override ground drop animation DC6 filename (blank uses base item default). Not read by 1.13c engine

dropsound.description: Sound played when the item drops on the ground. Not read by 1.13c engine

dropsfxframe.description: Animation frame on which the drop sound is triggered. Not read by 1.13c engine

usesound.description: Sound played when the item is picked up or equipped. Not read by 1.13c engine

cost mult.description: Multiplier applied to the base item cost (in 1024ths, so 1024 = 1x). Not read by 1.13c engine

cost add.description: Flat gold amount added to the item price after multiplication. Not read by 1.13c engine

add func.description: Controls how green (partial set) bonuses are applied: 0=none, 1=bonuses depend on which specific items are equipped, 2=bonuses depend on how many items are equipped

prop1.description: Fixed (blue) property 1 code applied when item is equipped. Not read by 1.13c engine

par1.description: Parameter for prop1 — skill ID, state ID, or other property-specific parameter. Not read by 1.13c engine

min1.description: Minimum value for prop1. Not read by 1.13c engine

max1.description: Maximum value for prop1. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop2.description: Fixed (blue) property 2 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par2.description: Parameter for prop2. Not read by 1.13c engine

min2.description: Minimum value for prop2. Not read by 1.13c engine

max2.description: Maximum value for prop2. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop3.description: Fixed (blue) property 3 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par3.description: Parameter for prop3. Not read by 1.13c engine

min3.description: Minimum value for prop3. Not read by 1.13c engine

max3.description: Maximum value for prop3. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop4.description: Fixed (blue) property 4 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par4.description: Parameter for prop4. Not read by 1.13c engine

min4.description: Minimum value for prop4. Not read by 1.13c engine

max4.description: Maximum value for prop4. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop5.description: Fixed (blue) property 5 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par5.description: Parameter for prop5. Not read by 1.13c engine

min5.description: Minimum value for prop5. Not read by 1.13c engine

max5.description: Maximum value for prop5. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop6.description: Fixed (blue) property 6 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par6.description: Parameter for prop6. Not read by 1.13c engine

min6.description: Minimum value for prop6. Not read by 1.13c engine

max6.description: Maximum value for prop6. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop7.description: Fixed (blue) property 7 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par7.description: Parameter for prop7. Not read by 1.13c engine

min7.description: Minimum value for prop7. Not read by 1.13c engine

max7.description: Maximum value for prop7. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop8.description: Fixed (blue) property 8 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par8.description: Parameter for prop8. Not read by 1.13c engine

min8.description: Minimum value for prop8. Not read by 1.13c engine

max8.description: Maximum value for prop8. Not read by 1.13c engine

prop9.description: Fixed (blue) property 9 code. Not read by 1.13c engine

par9.description: Parameter for prop9. Not read by 1.13c engine

min9.description: Minimum value for prop9. Not read by 1.13c engine

max9.description: Maximum value for prop9. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop1a.description: Partial set (green) bonus 1a — first property of pair 1, applied based on add func logic

apar1a.description: Parameter for aprop1a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amin1a.description: Minimum value for aprop1a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amax1a.description: Maximum value for aprop1a. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop1b.description: Partial set (green) bonus 1b — second property of pair 1

apar1b.description: Parameter for aprop1b. Not read by 1.13c engine

amin1b.description: Minimum value for aprop1b. Not read by 1.13c engine

amax1b.description: Maximum value for aprop1b. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop2a.description: Partial set (green) bonus 2a — first property of pair 2

apar2a.description: Parameter for aprop2a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amin2a.description: Minimum value for aprop2a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amax2a.description: Maximum value for aprop2a. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop2b.description: Partial set (green) bonus 2b — second property of pair 2

amax2b.description: Maximum value for aprop2b. Not read by 1.13c engine

amax3a.description: Maximum value for aprop3a. Not read by 1.13c engine

apar3b.description: Parameter for aprop3b. Not read by 1.13c engine

amin3b.description: Minimum value for aprop3b. Not read by 1.13c engine

amax3b.description: Maximum value for aprop3b. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop4a.description: Partial set (green) bonus 4a — first property of pair 4

apar4a.description: Parameter for aprop4a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amin4a.description: Minimum value for aprop4a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amax4a.description: Maximum value for aprop4a. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop4b.description: Partial set (green) bonus 4b — second property of pair 4

apar4b.description: Parameter for aprop4b. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop5a.description: Partial set (green) bonus 5a — first property of pair 5

apar5a.description: Parameter for aprop5a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amin5a.description: Minimum value for aprop5a. Not read by 1.13c engine

amax5a.description: Maximum value for aprop5a. Not read by 1.13c engine

aprop5b.description: Partial set (green) bonus 5b — second property of pair 5

apar5b.description: Parameter for aprop5b. Not read by 1.13c engine

amin5b.description: Minimum value for aprop5b. Not read by 1.13c engine

*eol.description: End of line marker — always 0, used by the game to detect row termination. Not read by 1.13c engine
